_description: Source catalog — every market pack field with v0.2 provenance references a source_id here.

frontur_2024_uk_segment.label: FRONTUR 2024 — UK emitting market segment
frontur_2024_uk_segment.sample_size_notes: Annual survey, n≈220K inbound travelers to Spain, ~18% UK origin
frontur_2024_uk_segment.notes: UK outbound volume, length of stay, segment mix, spending

egatur_2024_uk.label: EGATUR 2024 — Spending survey, UK segment
egatur_2024_uk.notes: Ancillary spend per night, total trip spending

ons_uk_travel_trends_2024.label: ONS Travel Trends 2024
ons_uk_travel_trends_2024.notes: Outbound volume by destination, origin airport distribution, demographic mix

aena_traffic_palma_mao_2024.label: AENA — Palma de Mallorca + Menorca (MAO) 2024 traffic statistics
aena_traffic_palma_mao_2024.notes: Flight volume by origin airport, seasonality signals

phocuswright_consumer_eu_2024.label: Phocuswright European Consumer Travel Report 2024
phocuswright_consumer_eu_2024.notes: Booking channel share, mobile vs desktop, cancellation behavior

cornell_hq_2024_uk_elasticity.label: Cornell Hospitality Quarterly Vol 65 (2024) — UK outbound leisure pricing elasticity
cornell_hq_2024_uk_elasticity.publisher: Cornell University — School of Hotel Administration
cornell_hq_2024_uk_elasticity.notes: Price elasticity coefficient for UK leisure travelers to Mediterranean

skift_uk_market_report_2024.label: Skift UK Market Intelligence 2024
skift_uk_market_report_2024.notes: Review writing behavior, platform share, complaint escalation patterns

statista_uk_travel_2024.label: Statista UK Travel Intelligence 2024
statista_uk_travel_2024.notes: Device share, payment preferences, loyalty penetration

holidaycheck_2024_de_analysis.label: HolidayCheck DE 2024 review corpus analysis
holidaycheck_2024_de_analysis.notes: Non-refundable acceptance, complaint tone, satisfaction patterns

fur_reiseanalyse_2024.label: FUR Reiseanalyse 2024
fur_reiseanalyse_2024.notes: German outbound travel behavior, booking window, length of stay

hofstede_cultural_dimensions.label: Hofstede Cultural Dimensions (6-D model)
hofstede_cultural_dimensions.notes: Uncertainty avoidance, individualism, power distance — feed cluster baselines

expert_synthesis_2026.label: Internal expert synthesis (Synthetic Users team, 2026)
expert_synthesis_2026.notes: Values inferred from multiple sources where no single primary source exists; flagged for replacement as real data arrives
